'''Nilwoon''' was a corrupt [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] agent of a syndicate found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He approached a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to offer them 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to rescue [[Maxine Baytor]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] custody with no questions asked. The group turned him down, however, and delivered her to the Rebel Alliance instead.
